items.text: The brand-new Chain-Reaction Slime has arrived to trigger insane combos
The Freeze Slime has been officially retired to pave the way for chain reactions
Adventure Mode has received a huge rebalance for a smoother progression experience
Removed the "Danger Bad" mechanic based on player feedback to focus on pure fast-paced fun
Targeting 120 FPS by default with Vsync disabled for butter-smooth arcade action
Fresh live in-game notification systems added for real-time updates
Highly accurate delivery updates and notifications for daily reward streaks
UI overhauls featuring beautiful new interface designs across the game
Clearer reward feedback and text integrated directly into the Win Panel
Vastly improved Slime bounce and movement animations
Resolved a variety of critical edge-case bugs and performance slowdowns
Added keyboard support for Back, ESC, and Space keys
Space key can now activate pet abilities mid-game
Daily systems improvements
Fixed Freeze and Mirror slime behaviour
Improved stability and overall gameplay performance
UI labels and text refined
Disabled unsupported non-PC features for better compatibility
Fixed issues introduced in the previous build
Improved overall stability and performance
Fixed bugs affecting cloud save, leaderboards, and notifications
Fixed an issue that could cause multiple save conflicts
Improved notification reliability
Fixed various edge-case issues
Chubby — free starter pet that grows all slimes to 150% size for 5s. Existing players receive it automatically on their next level
Icons tab added to the Store panel
Player icons now display on the global leaderboard with a polished animated UI
All slime types are now 15% larger
Casual Mode rebalanced to be more accessible
Casual Mode pause exploit patched — pause can no longer be used to gain an unfair advantage
Pinball ability (Maximus companion) now correctly eliminates isBad slimes
Pet upgrade progress display fixed — no more 0% → 0% confusion; percentages now clearly reflect actual progress
Level feedback analytics events now correctly include level data
Progress system edge case fixes
Integrity API checks added to protect against piracy
Enhanced Slime Discovery panel UI
Improved Game HUD for Adventure and Casual modes for a sleeker experience
Notification system fixed to reliably deliver rewards updates
Enhanced analytics and internal systems stability
Performance optimisations for smoother gameplay
Redesigned Win & Fail panels
Report system for Adventure levels
Mission progress is now shown after every run
Casual waves can now be paused mid-run
Explosion Slimes now worth 3 points
Shield Slime behaviour corrected
Enhanced account protection & cloud syncing
New SFX added throughout the game
UI/UX improvements across multiple screens
Surf Mode stability tweaks
Companions & Pets abilities fully reworked
Massive UI & font overhaul across all menus
New VFX & enhanced in-game visuals
10 new achievements via Google Play Games
Daily reward push notifications
In-app rating prompt added
Privacy Policy & personalised ads consent shown in-app
Companions & Pets remote configuration support
Adventure Mode levels rebalanced for better pacing
Devourer spawning bug fixed
New AES encryption — ⚠️ progress was reset as part of this upgrade
Bad word filtering for player display names
In-game version check panel — notifies players when an update is required
Casual Mode tweaked for smoother gameplay flow
Minor fixes and general stability improvements
Fixed progress resetting after force-closing the app
Save system stability and startup loading improved
Improved UI clarity and responsiveness across menus
Daily reward screen layout and feedback improved
General performance and reliability improvements
Fixed an issue causing player progress loss
Google Play Games connection stability improved
New UI elements and smooth animations on the Leaderboard screen
New countdown popup animation
Significant balance adjustments to Casual Mode
General UI improvements and bug fixes
ARM7 support added for wider device compatibility
Google Play Services & UGS Remote Config integrated
Force Update notifications so players stay on the latest version
Data Deletion option added inside Settings
Profile UI streamlined; loading sequences updated
Daily Missions now reset correctly
Wave Mode stability improved
SlimeSmash is live on Google Play! 🎉
Adventure Mode — pop slimes, collect coins, unlock companions
Casual Mode — endless waves, play at your own pace
Starter slime roster to discover and collect
